entries.title: Harden frontend readiness contract and diagnostics
summary: Finalizes frontend-facing API contract readiness before minimal frontend work.
Adds or hardens runtime smoke tests, typed frontend API boundary checks, diagnostics, and generated contract verification.

entries.title: Start codebase quality and security hardening pass
summary: Started codebase quality, security, duplication, decomposition, and maintainability hardening pass.

entries.title: Complete codebase quality and security hardening pass
summary: Reviewed backend routes, services, repositories, schemas, frontend typed API boundary, OpenAPI contract, tests, and tooling.
Hardened admin token verification to use constant-time comparison (secrets.compare_digest) to remove a timing side-channel.
Extended the admin token regression test to cover prefix and longer-token rejection.
Confirmed SQL access is parameterized with whitelisted sort columns and validated locales, public endpoints restrict status to published/archived, and no runtime/cache/build artifacts are tracked.
checks: python -m mypy apps packages scripts tests
